title: December 22, 2014 – Holiday Songs
summary: To join in the holiday spirit, this week we play some of our favorite Native Christmas songs, many sung in a variety of languages including Cree, Navajo, and Ojibwe. Tune in as we feature music from Jana Mashonee, Brul é , Warscout, Robbie Robertson, Samantha Crain, and much more. Playlist : Los Lon...
